features.title: Smart Tech for Living
features.description: Discover how our devices maintain the perfect balance of humidity and freshness in your home.

contacts.title: Get in Touch
contacts.consent: I agree to the processing of my personal data

about.title: Our Story
about.intro_text: We are a team of experts dedicated to creating innovative solutions for your lifestyle. With years of experience, we bring cutting-edge ideas to the world of portable devices. Our mission is to make modern technology accessible and convenient for everyone.

items.name: Alexander
items.text: The best humidifier for my home office. Super quiet operation.

items.name: Maria
items.text: This fan is a lifesaver for travel. Very durable build quality.

catalog.title: Full Catalog
catalog.description: Choose your perfect device for a fresher, more comfortable home

aquamist-desktop.name: AquaMist Desktop
aquamist-desktop.description: Compact humidifier with LED lighting and low noise level.
benefits: Ultrasonic humidification for healthy sleep and productive work.
Soft LED lighting that creates a cozy evening atmosphere.
Low noise level that won't distract you from tasks or rest.
Stylish design that fits perfectly into any office or home interior.

nanobreeze-pocket.name: NanoBreeze Pocket
nanobreeze-pocket.description: Pocket fan that lasts up to 8 hours on a single charge.
benefits: Ultralight body that fits even in a small pocket.
Up to 8 hours of battery life thanks to an energy-efficient battery.
Safety blades that automatically stop when touched.
Charges via standard USB from a power bank or laptop.

frostyhand-v2.name: FrostyHand V2
frostyhand-v2.description: Powerful handheld fan with three speed modes.
benefits: Three speed modes for personalized cooling adjustment.
Ergonomic handle for comfortable holding over long periods.
Powerful airflow capable of instantly refreshing you in the heat.
Improved construction stability for use on flat surfaces.

cloudhumid-mini.name: CloudHumid Mini
cloudhumid-mini.description: Ultrasonic humidifier with aroma diffuser function.
benefits: Built-in aroma diffuser to create a pleasant scent in the room.
Automatic shut-off when water level is low.
Fine mist that doesn't leave water droplets on furniture.
Replaceable filters for long-lasting and clean operation.

stormpocket-turbo.name: StormPocket Turbo
stormpocket-turbo.description: Turbo fan for extreme cooling in the heat.
benefits: Turbo motor for maximum powerful airflow.
Metal protective coating to prevent accidental damage.
Fast charging mode for active travelers.
Special clip for hanging on a backpack or bag.

aquaglow-portable.name: AquaGlow Portable
benefits: Complete mobility without being tied to an outlet via a 2000mAh battery.
Battery level indicator so you always know when to recharge.
Dual spray for quickly achieving comfortable humidity levels.
Tip-over protection thanks to the rubberized base.
